Question: How do I reset my password?
Answer: To reset your password, click on 'Forgot Password' on the login page and follow the instructions sent to your registered email.

Question: How can I contact customer support?
Answer: You can contact our support team by emailing us at support@example.com or by calling 1800-123-4567 (Mon-Sat, 9 AM - 6 PM).

Answer: We accept Visa, MasterCard, PayPal, and UPI as payment methods.

Question: How do I cancel my subscription?
Answer: Go to Account Settings > Subscription > Cancel.

Question: Can I get a refund if I cancel early?
Answer: Our refund policy allows for a full refund within 7 days of purchase. Please contact support to process your refund.

Answer: Yes, we use industry-standard end-to-end encryption to protect all user data and personal information.
